shadcn-html / slider

Made from: CSS

Slider

An input for selecting a value from a range. Built on native <input type="range"> with custom track and thumb styling.

Component Specification — components/slider/slider.md

Native basis

<input type="range"> element with custom styling.

Web Platform APIs

<input type="range"> ::-webkit-slider-thumb ::-webkit-slider-runnable-track

Accessibility

• Native <input type="range"> provides full keyboard support (arrow keys, Home, End).

• Use <label> with for for description.

• min, max, step attributes define the range.

• aria-valuetext for custom value descriptions (e.g., "50%").

Default

Range slider with default value.

<input class="slider" type="range" min="0" max="100" value="50">

With label

<label class="label" for="vol">Volume</label>
<input class="slider" type="range" id="vol" min="0" max="100" value="75">

Disabled

<input class="slider" type="range" disabled>

Full specification → components/slider/slider.md
